Looking at the 7 categories:
1. '行政行为-行政登记' - Administrative act - administrative registration

5. '行政行为-行政裁决' - Administrative act - administrative adjudication
6. '刑事赔偿' - Criminal compensation
7. '执行案由-其他案由' - Execution cause - other causes

This translates to: "Yunnan Province Industry Development Group Co., Ltd. (hereinafter referred to as Yunnan Province Industry Company) disagrees with the Yunnan Provincial High People's Court (hereinafter referred to as Yunnan High Court) (2023) Yun Zhi Yi No. 1 execution ruling, and applies to this court for execution reconsideration."

This is clearly about "执行复议" (execution reconsideration) of an "执行裁定" (execution ruling). The case number "(2023)云执异1号" indicates it's an execution objection case (执异 = 执行异议).

This falls under the category: '执行案由-对下级法院执行异议裁定的复议' (Execution cause - reconsideration of lower court's execution objection ruling)

一、撤销云南省高级人民法院（2023）云执异1号执行裁定；
二、本案由云南省高级人民法院重新审查处理。
本裁定为终审裁定。
